suggestions.reason: The English source uses root-relative paths (/llm-routing-mastra-ai). The translation changed them to relative parent paths (../) which will break links if the site structure expects root-relative URLs as per the source.
Restoring root-relative path to match English source.

rationale: The candidate provides a superior translation of technical idioms like 'flaky' and 'lost in the middle' compared to the current version. It maintains Dan's direct, slightly informal tone well. The only significant issue is the modification of internal link paths in the 'Read the Series' section, which I have corrected to match the English source's root-relative structure.
